title: scabiosa taygetea subsp. taygetea
intro: Scabiosa taygetea subsp. taygetea, a plant species belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae), is also known as Taygete scabiosa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Scabiosa taygetea subsp. taygetea include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, and infusions of the leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various ailments.
